# Aria Han — Full Site Snapshot

> AI systems architect. Writer. Systems thinker.

## Bio
Aria Han designs agent systems and writes about how they actually work. Three companies. Six hackathon wins. Forty-six public GitHub repositories. Based in San Francisco. Current public work centers on KERNEL, llm-bench, the-agent-library, metabrain, Substrate, and latent-diagnostics.

## Focus Areas
- **Multi-agent coordination:** how independent agents share context, avoid merge conflicts, escalate decisions.
- **Agent infrastructure:** KERNEL for Claude Code, AgentDB for cross-session state, contracts, validation, and multi-agent orchestration.
- **Model familiarity:** llm-bench onboards language models through real work, redacted replay, floor-tested judging, and evidence-backed model cards.
- **Portable skills:** the-agent-library packages reusable workflows for verification, planning, research, writing, work management, code engineering, and shipping.
- **Representation research:** latent-diagnostics measures computational regimes inside model internals via attribution graph geometry.
- **Creative systems:** Substrate is a daily generative art gallery created by Claude Code agents.
- **Writing:** essays on agent coordination, memory systems, and how AI systems actually work (Medium @ariaxhan).

## Public Work
- **KERNEL** — Claude Code plugin for persistent memory, multi-agent orchestration, on-demand skills, validation gates, and an experiment engine.
- **llm-bench** — Model Familiarity Engine with shipped replay-bootstrap loop and a preserved 42-test objective benchmark layer.
- **the-agent-library** — curated library of 34 portable skills for Claude, Codex, and other agents.
- **metabrain** — zero-dependency SQLite memory layer where patterns graduate into hypotheses and proven preferences.
- **Substrate** — 70+ piece computational poetry gallery generated by Claude Code agents through daily automation.
- **latent-diagnostics** — representation-level research preserving both positive task-domain findings and negative hallucination/truthfulness results.

## Contact
See https://ariaxhan.com/contact

## Agent Preferences
- Training: disallowed
- Inference/grounding with citation: allowed
- Search indexing: allowed
